hero.subtitle: Fresh Graduate Computer Engineering Technology Student | Web Developer Enthusiast | Engineering & Maintenance Enthusiast.

profile.name: Muhammad Wisnu Ainun Najib
profile.role: Frontend Developer - IT Development at AirNav Indonesia
profile.aboutDesc1: Hello! I'm a passionate Frontend Developer dedicated to building responsive and user-friendly web applications. With a strong technical foundation in modern web technologies, I'm always eager to solve complex problems and craft elegant interface solutions.
profile.aboutDesc2: Currently part of the IT Development team at AirNav Indonesia, gaining hands-on experience in a professional environment and real-world projects that demand high-level system performance and reliability. In addition to software engineering, I also focus on architecture design and continuous maintenance.

about.title: PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
about.description: A graduate of D4 Computer Engineering Technology, Department of Electrical Engineering, from Politeknik Negeri Semarang with a strong interest in IT, particularly in engineering and maintenance roles. Experienced in website development and system maintenance. During an internship, I honed my skills in system management and technical problem-solving in real-world environments. Equipped with solid communication and teamwork abilities, ready to contribute to challenging and innovative projects.

job1.desc1: Develop authentication flow from UI to Back-End API integration, including error handling.
job1.desc2: Building reusable UI components and implementing fully responsive design for event management application (Navevent).
job1.desc3: Perform post-deployment debugging and maintenance, including fixing data synchronization (state management) bugs between views and the database.

job2.company: PT. Jasamarga Tollroad Operator Semarang Demak Section
job2.desc1: Recorded monthly AVC reports as part of operational monitoring, documented and reported daily traffic flow data at entrance and exit toll gates, including matrices and tariffs.
job2.desc2: Uploaded vehicle incident reports via the Jasa Marga Tollroad Operator website, created handover letters for patrol and ambulance equipment, and designed posters, advertisements, road signs, and highway warnings.
job2.desc3: Monitored system screens regularly to ensure vehicle classification accuracy, repaired unstable automatic barriers, fixed issues with transaction printers, and checked EDC machines.
job2.desc4: Performed maintenance and inspections of toll gate generators, monitored monthly server room temperatures for system maintenance, and conducted audits to ensure the readiness of all devices, facilities, and infrastructure.

proj1.title: Project NavEvent
proj1.desc: Web platform for event discovery, registration and management.

proj2.title: Makroni Kapok-Kapok Website
proj2.desc: Company profile and e-commerce website for the 'Makroni Kapok-Kapok' brand.

proj3.title: Project Translator
proj3.desc: A simple web tool for translating text between languages in real-time.
